title: pachystela micrantha
intro: Pachystela micrantha, also known as the yellow-flowered bush, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is primarily found in tropical regions of Africa. Pachystela micrantha has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's extracts and herbal preparations have been shown to offer health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function, and can be found in various preparations including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
